driver.reason: Fallback for unmatched devices with PIDs: CK-BL702-MWS-01, CK-BL702-MWS-01(7016), MG1_5RZ, SZLMR10, TS0203, TS0225, ZG-204ZH, ZG-204ZK, ZG-204ZL, ZG-204ZM, ZG-204ZV, ZG-205Z, ZP-301Z, SNZB-06P, ZG-204ZE, ZG-204ZQ, ZG-205ZL, ZG-302ZL, ZG-302ZM, TS0601, TS110E, TS0004
